description.unified: Attack frontal enemies in a circular range of self 2 times, dealing ??? P.DMG and knocking them down for [1.5 sec->2.5 sec]. [Proxy of God] Attacks enemeis in a wider range to deal ??? P.DMG and knock them down for [2 sec->3.5 sec].

Attacks the target 3 times, and then charges behind it to deal ??? P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by [30%->25%] for [4 sec->10 sec]. [Proxy of God] Attacks the target 3 times, charging behind it to deal ??? P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by 25% for 10 sec. 500 additional Crit Chance applies to this Skill.

Deals ??? P.DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [2 sec->3 sec]. Additionally, for [10 sec->20 sec], increases self's ATK by ???, ATK Spd by [30%->250], All Dodge Chance by [300->250], and DMG of normal attacks by [150%->125%] while gaining immunity to CC. This effect is irremovable.

Increases own All DEF by ??? and All Dodge Chance by [250->200]. When equipped with The Holly Sword, Aea, receives the blessing of the goddess that increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 30% and reduces DMG taken from Non-Hero enemies by 30%.

dark.unified: Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy.
Reduces the target's P.DEF by [35%->30%] for 10 sec.

light.unified: Reduces DMG taken by [25%->20%] while in [Proxy of God].

dark.unified: Increases Mana Cost by 1 and DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 100% for the duration of Skill.

description.unified: [Judgement Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times and is irremovable.
[Proxy of God] Additionally, Dodge Rate is increased by 250, and ATK Spd is increased by {0} for the duration of skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.
Each attack has a 35% chance to dealing {0}% of ATK as P.DMG. Has 0.5 sec Cooldown.
